videos.headline: Highlight: Mississippi State dominates in-state foe Alcorn State
videos.description: The Bulldogs spread the wealth as nine different players score a touchdown in the 63-0 win over the Braves.

videos.headline: Jeff Lebby details MS State finding their groove vs. Alcorn State
videos.description: Lebby recaps the Bulldogs performance on both sides of the field as he describes how this confidence-boosting win will be important heading into next week.
